raw_top_k.preview: TASK: During sprint planning, Maya requested idempotent write retries with jitter for checkout failures.
DECISION: Project checkout-reliability will use capped exponential backoff with a 90 second max window.
USER: Maya prefers bullet-point release notes with one-line risks.
TASK: Temporary experiment for legacy parser fallback during migration week.
DECISION: After migration week, parser fallback was removed from the active path.
RESEARCH: Nora documented that support tickets cluster around delayed refund notifications in AtlasPay.
TASK: Priya requested a Friday reminder to verify top-5 Helios crash signatures.
CONTEXT: Team AtlasPay stores refund webhook runbooks in the finance incident folder.
PROJECT: Helios mobile release moved crash triage ownership to Priya for sprint 9.
